messages.author: Anushka Jain
messages.text: PCS is throwing 500s on checkout. Anyone else seeing this? PagerDuty just woke me up.

replies.author: Aarav Sharma
replies.text: Yeah, payments checkout service is failing. Looks like Redis is OOM and rejecting connection requests.

replies.author: Anushka Jain
replies.text: Aarav, good catch. I am going to purge the transient cart keys and restart the Redis cache cluster.

replies.author: Aarav Sharma
replies.text: Confirming the restart resolved the OOM. PCS checkout latency is back down to 35ms. Incident closed.
